commit.message:
fix(ci): use EsrpCodeSigning + dotnet push for NuGet (#965)

EsrpRelease@11 does not support NuGet as a contenttype — it's for
PyPI/npm/Maven/crates.io package distribution. NuGet packages must be
signed with EsrpCodeSigning@5 first, then pushed with dotnet nuget push.

New flow:
1. EsrpCodeSigning@5 with NuGetSign + NuGetVerify operations (CP-401405)
2. dotnet nuget push with the signed .nupkg to nuget.org

This matches the standard Microsoft NuGet ESRP signing pattern used by
azure-sdk, dotnet runtime, and other Microsoft OSS projects.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial release v1.0.0

WoW addon for pixel-perfect UI alignment at 4K and all resolutions.

Features:
- N-multiplier scale engine: finds the integer N such that scale × physH / 768 = N,
  giving crisp pixel boundaries without tiny UI (at 4K: N=2, scale=0.7111)
- Bypasses WoW's 0.64 uiScale CVar floor via UIParent:SetScale()
- ElvUI integration: hooks UpdateUIScale, corrects E.mult for current N
- Frame Inspector: click any frame to see pixel dimensions, alignment status,
  suggested corrections, and live gap measurement between two frames
- Alignment tools: pixel grid overlay, draggable H/V guide lines (saved to DB),
  screen centre crosshair
- Full settings GUI with diagnostics, pixel snap calculator, minimap button
- Slash commands: /pp inspect, /pp grid, /pp hguide, /pp vguide, /pp center

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix TFLite model loading error on Render

ISSUE: PyCapsule error when loading model on Render:
  'Failed to load TFLite model: CreateWrapperFromFile returned exception'

ROOT CAUSE: tflite-runtime has compatibility issues with certain Python/ARM builds on Render

SOLUTION:
1. Replace tflite-runtime with tensorflow>=2.13.0
   - TensorFlow includes tf.lite for model inference
   - Works reliably across all platforms (CPU, ARM)
   - Slightly larger package but bulletproof compatibility

2. Improve model loading error handling
   - Better error messages to diagnose issues
   - Workaround retry logic for edge cases
   - Comprehensive fallback chain

3. Constrain numpy<2.0.0
   - Ensure compatibility with TensorFlow 2.13

Changes:
- backend/requirements.txt: Replace tflite-runtime with tensorflow>=2.13.0
- backend/serve.py: Enhanced error handling and logging in model loading

Testing:
- TensorFlow 2.12.0 already available on local system
- Model loads successfully with tf.lite.Interpreter
- 122 labels confirmed loaded

Deployment:
- Render will rebuild with new requirements.txt
- Model should load successfully on next deployment

Add DELETE /api/users/:userId purge endpoint

Permanently deletes a user and all associated data (notifications,
push_subscriptions, device_tokens, reset_codes, users row). Only the
authenticated user can delete their own account (403 otherwise).
Open SSE connections for the user are closed immediately on deletion.

Also:
- Extract shared purgeUser() + disconnectSseClients() helpers; reuse
  them in the existing reset-confirm flow (no behaviour change there)
- Document the new endpoint in API_DOCS.md
